title: orobus ochroleucus
intro: Orobus ochroleucus is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, known for its yellow or white flowers. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Orobus ochroleucus include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers, as well as its use as an antacid. Herbal preparations of Orobus ochroleucus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
